projects.title: Cloud Data Warehousing with Snowflake & AWS
projects.description: Engineered a cloud native data warehouse on Snowflake with AWS S3, implementing automated Snowpipe ingestion and IAM-secured storage integration for Tesla sales streaming data. Deployed AWS QuickSight dashboards tracking 5+ real-time KPIs for business intelligence, reducing manual reporting effort by 35% through serverless compute optimization.

projects.title: Retail Data Analytics — Python & SQL Integration
projects.description: Designed an end-to-end ETL pipeline using Pandas, NumPy, and SQL Server to extract, clean, and analyze 100K+ retail sales records, identifying top 10 revenue products and key customer purchasing patterns. Delivered 8+ actionable insights on inventory optimization and customer segmentation across 4 product categories.

projects.title: Insurance Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Developed interactive Power BI dashboards with 10+ advanced DAX measures to analyze 3 insurance policy types, claim patterns, and smoker vs. non-smoker risk segmentation across 5,000+ records for underwriting optimization.

projects.title: Global Cybersecurity Threat Analysis
projects.description: Constructed interactive Power BI dashboards visualizing global cybersecurity trends (2015–2024), including malware types, attack vectors, and high-risk regions. Integrated and transformed 9 years of multi-source cybersecurity datasets covering 50+ countries.

projects.title: Healthcare Financial Performance Analysis
projects.description: Integrated 5+ CMS datasets and conducted regression analysis to assess U.S. nursing home financial performance (2015–2021), revealing a 1,178% net income increase in larger facilities during COVID-19. Visualized 6+ penalty trends, staffing metrics, and quality indicators across 1,000+ facilities.

projects.title: Starbucks Consumer Behavior Analysis
projects.description: Managed end-to-end analytics pipeline from web scraping to stakeholder presentation using RStudio; created 4+ geospatial maps across 10+ regions to surface key consumer trends.

projects.title: Indian Cricket Team Performance Analysis
projects.description: Extracted 10+ years of cricket data from 5 sources via Python/R web scraping; applied Random Forest, regression, and hypothesis testing to evaluate efficiency metrics (PER, Win Shares) across 50+ players.

projects.title: NYC Taxi Data Lake on GCP
projects.description: Built a scalable data lake on Google Cloud Platform for NYC taxi trip data using BigQuery, Cloud Storage, and Terraform-managed infrastructure. Automated ingestion pipelines to process millions of trip records for geospatial and fare analysis.

projects.title: Real-Time Stock Market Pipeline
projects.description: Engineered a real-time stock market data pipeline using Apache Kafka and Python, streaming live market data into AWS S3 for downstream analytics. Implemented fault-tolerant producers and consumers for continuous financial data ingestion.

projects.title: Spotify Listening Analytics
projects.description: Developed an end-to-end analytics pipeline for Spotify listening history, orchestrating data extraction via the Spotify API, transformation with Python, and visualization of listening trends, top artists, and genre distributions.

projects.title: Multi-Source Marketing Analytics
projects.description: Integrated marketing data from multiple advertising platforms into a unified analytics layer using Python ETL scripts, enabling cross-channel campaign performance comparison and ROI attribution analysis.
